rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (2/10) and make the same substantive judgment: the candidate lacks SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator/hardware, and deep-learning workload experience, with a background skewed toward web/application software. The wording differs (e.g., emphasizing 'Dlang' and adding 'GPU architecture'), but these are ordinary run-to-run rewording variations, not shifts tied to the name change. No reasoning keys off the candidate being named Sarah Smith versus Bogdan Szabo.
